name: Storz & Bickel Dosing Capsule Set - 40 Count
summary: A package of 40 Storz and Bickel dosing capsules, each capable of holding a little more than 0.1 grams of dry herbal blends.
description: A package of 40 Storz and Bickel dosing capsules, each capable of holding a little more than 0.1 grams of dry herbal blends. These can be used in the Mighty and Crafty and can also be used in the Plenty and Volcano Vaporisers (Easy Valve set only) with the chamber reducer ring. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
